stack.summary: Next.js 14 App Router static site with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and server-side data fetching from Hygraph GraphQL and Dev.to REST APIs.

architecture.summary: Next.js App Router with Server Components, ISR revalidation (600s), static site generation. No local database — data fetched from external APIs at build/runtime.

dataModel.summary: No persistent data model — stateless service. All types defined in TypeScript interfaces (src/types/). Data sourced from Hygraph (GraphQL) and Dev.to (REST).

apiSurface.summary: Two external API integrations: Hygraph GraphQL (content management) and Dev.to REST (blog posts). Internal Next.js routes for 5 pages.

endpoints.purpose: Hygraph GraphQL queries (getUser, getMoreDetails, getRepos, getUses)
Fetch published blog posts from Dev.to

uiSurface.summary: 5-page static site with responsive design, dark mode support, and mobile navigation.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Greeting, summary, contact, recent projects, experience

screens.name: About
screens.purpose: Bio with rich text, display picture, tech stack logos, contact

screens.name: Projects
screens.purpose: GitHub repository grid with project cards

screens.name: Uses
screens.purpose: Developer tools and tech stack list

integrations.summary: Two external data sources (Hygraph, Dev.to), one analytics service (Vercel), SVG icon processing via webpack.

conventions.summary: TypeScript strict mode, ESLint with next/core-web-vitals + @typescript-eslint + prettier + jsx-a11y, Jest snapshot tests, Tailwind CSS with dark mode, path aliases, import ordering via Prettier.
conventions.formatter: Prettier 3.3.3 (singleQuote, semi, tabWidth 2, importOrder grouping, tailwindcss plugin)
